title: Confiteor - I confess
text:
Confiteor is Latin for “I confess.”
I hope that this inspires you to read and learn about the numerous different confessional texts found in the Christian traditions.
This website is a work in progress.

title: About
text:
Confiteor is Latin for “I confess.”
This site serves as an encouragement to read and engage with the texts that we might ‘confess.’
